  - Add LICENSE

Modified: head/devel/p5-Package-Constants/Makefile

+++ head/devel/p5-Package-Constants/Makefile	Fri Apr 25 12:13:58 2014	(r352110)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Package-Constants
-PORTVERSION=	0.02
+PORTVERSION=	0.04
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -10,6 +10,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	miwi@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	List all constants declared in a package
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
